title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Baidyanath - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Baidyanath - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Baidyanath has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Gurgaon office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Baidyanath:
Baidyanath is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Baidyanath!
